description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-section layout with a mix of flat and gently sloped rooflines, and a variety of window shapes and sizes distributed across its facade. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with accents of beige and gray, and includes several outdoor amenities such as a swimming pool, a circular above-ground pool, a playground set, and a patio area. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and access to the backyard, while the front entryway is defined by a modest porch and a central door. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a tiered effect. Architectural details include a combination of rectangular and arched windows, as well as multiple outdoor living spaces. The overall design suggests a contemporary suburban style with family-oriented features and a focus on outdoor recreation.
description: A large, light-colored two-story suburban house with multiple rooflines, large windows, and extensive outdoor amenities including pools and a playground.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, central door, and a modest porch with several windows and architectural details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard amenities, including a swimming pool, above-ground pool, and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the playground set, patio, and large sliding glass doors leading to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the driveway, and the overall length of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a modest porch, steps, and minimal decorative elements
